/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/dh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/server.cpp.o -o output/main  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
